interpretation: FIRES on 3/3 E1-verified misses (dc58/db7b/5886), stability 1.0 — exceeds the >=2/3 gate. Posture is ADVISORY (never blocks), so this false-fire is a non-blocking coaching nudge and is recorded here as the first datapoint for the advisory->blocking promotion gate (docs/plan-review-gate.md): the criterion must NOT be promoted to blocking until its dogfood blocking-FP proxy is acceptably low.
